name: Henry Kaestner
title: Co-founder of Bandwidth.com & Sovereign's Capital
bio: American entrepreneur, investor, and co-founder of Bandwidth.com (a publicly traded communications platform) and Sovereign's Capital, a faith-driven investing firm.
faith: Kaestner is a vocal Christian who co-hosts the 'Faith Driven Entrepreneur' podcast and movement, which encourages Christians to view business as a calling. He has spoken extensively about integrating faith with entrepreneurship and investing.
